overview.title: 📧 Account Management
overview.maxAccountReached: You have reached the maximum account limit (1 account).
overview.noAccounts:
You don't have any accounts connected yet. Click the button below to add one.
Be sure you connected your gryphline account on [skport.com](https://skport.com) to fetch your game accounts!
overview.footer: You can link one game account (either Asia or EU/NA server)

loginMethod.title: 🔐 Select Login Method
loginMethod.description:
Choose how you want to authenticate:

**Skport** - Full account linking with access to all features
**Headhunting History** - Import only your wish history and basic account info

skport.title: 🔗 Link Your Skport Account
skport.description:
By linking your Skport account, you'll get access to:

1. **Access to your ingame information in real time**
2. **Access to your ingame spaceship information**
3. **Ability to claim your Daily Check-in rewards from discord**
4. **Access your Headhunting History Straight from your account**

Choose your preferred registration method:

wishHistory.title: 🎯 Headhunting History Import
wishHistory.description:
**Only your Headhunting History will be imported.** Basic information from your account will be available.

Choose your platform to get started:

tokenInstructions.title: 🔑 How to Get Your Account Token
tokenInstructions.description:
> To begin login to your skport account
https://www.skport.com/

> Once logged in open the dev tools using F12 on your keyboard

> On the tabs, select the one that says Application tab or storage tab on specific browsers

> On the left hand side, select cookies and click on the website to view all your site cookies

> Then click on the one that says ACCOUNT_TOKEN and click on the bottom show URL decoded and then copy the token

serverSelection.title: 🎮 Select Server
serverSelection.description: Choose which game account you want to link:

accountAdded.title: {statusYes} Account Added Successfully
accountAdded.autoImportNote: 🎯 Your Headhunting History is being imported automatically.

remove.selectDisconnectDescription: Choose which account to disconnect (credentials will be removed, settings kept):
remove.selectDeleteDescription: Choose which account to delete completely:
remove.disconnectedDescription:
Your account credentials have been removed.

**✨ Preserved:**
• Daily claim settings
• Notification preferences
• Account configuration

**🔄 To reconnect:** Use `/reauth` to add your credentials back!
remove.disconnectError: An error occurred while disconnecting your account.
remove.deletedDescription:
Your account has been completely removed from this bot.

**🗑️ Deleted:**
• All credentials
• Daily claim settings
• Notification preferences
• All account data

**Note:** Your game account on the servers is unchanged.
Use `/accounts` to add it again if needed.
remove.deleteError: An error occurred while deleting your account.
remove.noAccountsDescription: You don't have any accounts to remove.
remove.chooseActionDescription:
Choose how you want to handle your account:

**🔌 Disconnect** - Remove credentials only
• Keeps your daily claim settings
• Keeps notification preferences
• Can reconnect later with `/reauth`

**🗑️ Delete** - Complete removal
• Deletes all bot data
• Removes all settings
• Must use `/accounts` to add again

errors.showImportOptionsFailed: An error occurred while showing import options.
errors.showMethodDetailsFailed: An error occurred while showing method details.
errors.invalidLinkTokenMissing: Could not find Token in the provided link.
errors.noAccountsFoundDesc: No game accounts found linked to this account.
errors.linkProcessFailed: An error occurred while processing your link.
errors.invalidUrl: The provided link is not a valid URL.
errors.sessionExpired: Authentication session expired. Please start over.
errors.addAccountFailed: An error occurred while adding your account.
